build.xcode_build: xcodebuild -project iosApp/iosApp.xcodeproj -scheme iosApp -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16 Pro' -configuration Debug build

placeholder.description: Initial placeholder screen — full Circuit navigation pending

notes: Currently shows placeholder UI — full Circuit navigation not yet wired
AI features not available on iOS (core/ai module is Android-only)
Use XcodeGen to regenerate the Xcode project: cd iosApp && xcodegen generate
xcrun simctl io tap requires Xcode 14+ (command available in Xcode 14.3+)
Accessibility tree dump (xcrun simctl ui) requires Xcode 15+ with --accessibility flag
Screen coordinates are in logical points (not physical pixels) — divide pixel coords by scale (3)

fallback_coordinates._note: Logical-point coordinates for iPhone 16 Pro (393x852 points). Use these if xcrun simctl io tap is unavailable.
